paper_title: Comprehensive and Practical Evaluation of Retrieval-Augmented Generation Systems for Medical Question Answering

methodology.approach: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for medical question answering
methodology.challenges: Healthcare applications require careful evaluation of RAG systems due to potential for factual errors in retrieved documents

previous_benchmarks.name: MedEval
previous_benchmarks.description: Large-scale, expert-annotated benchmark covering various medical tasks and domains

benchmark.name: Medical Retrieval-Augmented Generation Benchmark (MedRGB)
benchmark.basis: Questions from 4 medical QA datasets from MIRAGE

test_scenarios.name: Standard-RAG
test_scenarios.description: Evaluates LLM performance with multiple retrieved signal documents

test_scenarios.name: Sufficiency
test_scenarios.description: Evaluates LLM reliability with noise documents, includes 'Insufficient Information' option

test_scenarios.name: Integration
test_scenarios.description: Evaluates LLM ability to answer multiple supporting questions and integrate information

test_scenarios.name: Robustness
test_scenarios.description: Evaluates LLM resiliency to factual errors in retrieved context

contributions: Established MedRGB with four test scenarios for evaluating LLMs for medical QA tasks in RAG settings
First comprehensive benchmark for this purpose
title: Comprehensive and Practical Evaluation of Retrieval-Augmented Generation Systems for Medical Question Answering
